user.title: LifeSmart Integration Setup
user.description: Enter your LifeSmart Platform credentials and user details to connect.

user.title: LifeSmart Connection Settings
user.description: Update your LifeSmart Platform credentials and user details.

ac_device.title: Select SPOT Device
ac_device.description: Choose a LifeSmart SPOT device that has an A/C remote assigned in the LifeSmart app.

ac_brand.title: Select A/C Brand
ac_brand.description: Select the air conditioner brand for the chosen SPOT device.

ac_remote.title: Select Remote Profile
ac_remote.description: Choose the remote profile index from the LifeSmart A/C API results.

ac_remove.title: Remove SPOT A/C Remote
ac_remove.description: Select the configured SPOT A/C remote to remove.

main_params.title: LifeSmart Integration Options
main_params.description: Update LifeSmart Platform credentials and user details.

abort.no_spot_devices: No SPOT devices found for this account.
abort.no_ac_config: No configured SPOT A/C remotes found.

error.no_ac_remote_assigned: The selected SPOT device has no A/C remote assigned in the LifeSmart app.
error.no_ac_brands: No A/C brands returned by the LifeSmart API.
error.no_remote_idxs: No remote profiles found for the selected A/C brand.

send_ir_code.name: Send IR Code
send_ir_code.description: Send a custom IR code to a remote device.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device ID (me) of the target device.

hub_id.name: Hub ID
hub_id.description: The hub ID (agt) of the target hub.

ir_code.name: IR Code
ir_code.description: The IR code data to send.

send_keys.name: Send IR Keys
send_keys.description: Send IR key commands to a remote device.

me.name: Sub-Device ID
me.description: The sub-device ID of the target device.

agt.name: Hub ID
agt.description: The hub ID of the target hub.

category.name: Device Category
category.description: The category of the target device (e.g., TV, fan).

brand.name: Device Brand
brand.description: The brand of the target device.

send_ackeys.name: Send A/C Keys
send_ackeys.description: Send IR commands to control an air conditioner.

me.name: Sub-Device ID
me.description: The sub-device ID of the A/C device.

agt.name: Hub ID
agt.description: The hub ID of the target hub.

ai.name: Remote ID
ai.description: The remote device ID for the A/C.

category.name: Device Category
category.description: The category of the A/C device.

brand.name: Device Brand
brand.description: The brand of the A/C device.

mode.name: Operating Mode
mode.description: The A/C operating mode (e.g., cool, heat).

scene_set.name: Set Scene
scene_set.description: Activate a scene on a remote device.

agt.name: Hub ID
agt.description: The hub ID of the target hub.

id.name: Scene ID
id.description: The ID of the scene to activate.
